title: Catalan Carnage
title_candidates: Baker at the Top of the Stadium
theme: On a brutal championship test, Jon Baker stays out of trouble while everyone else finds it — and John Patterson finds it three times over.
opening_hook: Open on the Stadium Course's reputation as Spain's premier test — and the bloodbath it duly produced on TEG's second visit, with quintuples, quadruples and a leaderboard reshuffled by attrition.
foreshadow: Gregg Williams haemorrhages eight shots in the opening three holes — a hole he never quite climbs out of
Patterson's quintuple at the 4th sets the template for a round he'll repeat at the 13th
Early lead changes at holes 3, 6 and 7 hint at the bunched field that only Jon Baker will eventually escape

competition_state.name: Trophy
competition_state.note: Lead changed hands repeatedly inside the front nine — JB level at the 3rd, DM level at the 3rd and 6th, even JP level at the 7th — before Jon Baker pulled clear with 35 points to lead Alex Baker by 3 and the rest by 5+.

competition_state.name: Green Jacket
competition_state.note: Jon Baker drew level at the 3rd, was joined by David Mullin at the 6th, then edged ahead by round's end on gross +18, two clear of Mullin and ten clear of the chasing pack.

competition_state.name: Wooden Spoon
competition_state.note: Patterson sank to the bottom at the 14th after a 12–14 stretch that bled 11 shots; three quad-or-worse holes (4, 13, 17) left him 3 adrift of Mullin at the foot.

players.arc: Survived the Stadium's worst by avoiding it — drew level at the 3rd in both races and never relinquished, ending the day leading Trophy (35) and Green Jacket (+18).
Solid 32 points kept him second in the Trophy despite a quadruple-bogey 8 at the 13th that prevented a closer chase.
Briefly led both races (level at the 3rd and 6th) before settling for second in the Jacket on +20 and fourth in the Trophy on 29.
Bled eight shots over the first three holes, then added a quintuple-bogey 8 at the par-3 5th — yet salvaged 30 points to sit third in the Trophy.
A round of horrors: quintuples at the 4th and 13th, quadruples at the 10th and 17th, an 11-shot bleed across 12–14, brief share of the Trophy lead at the 7th, and last by nightfall.

venue_notes: TEG's 2nd visit to PGA Catalunya - Stadium (and 2nd to Catalonia) — a European Tour-designed championship parkland that lived up to its billing as Spain's premier test. Frame the carnage as the course doing what world-class venues do.
